title: The Alchemist's Lossy Decanting Puzzle: Shortest Valve Plan to a Target Measure
strategies: walk the planted long backbone chain valve-by-valve (trivial)
one-step nearest-value search with no lookahead (greedy)
BFS over the finite (tank, exact-volume) multiplicative lattice, exploiting overshoot-then-cancel shortcuts (strong)
provably-minimal plan length via full lattice/number-theoretic analysis (open ceiling, uncovered)
